title: Hong Kong retiree loses $840K in triple crypto scam

slides.label: CRYPTO SCAM
slides.heading: $840K Gone
slides.body: A 66-year-old retiree in Hong Kong lost $840,000 in three crypto scams.

slides.label: THE TRAP
slides.heading: Fake Experts, False Promises
slides.body: Scammers claimed to be experts, promising steady returns.

slides.label: TRIPLE SCAM
slides.heading: Scammed Three Times
slides.body: After losing money the first time, the retiree tried to recover funds but got scammed twice more.

slides.label: POLICE WARNING
slides.heading: Don't Trust Unsolicited Offers
slides.body: Police warn: Beware of guaranteed profits and unsolicited crypto offers.

slides.label: STAY SAFE
slides.heading: Protect Yourself
slides.body: Stay smart and protect yourself from rising crypto fraud.
